notes: Round 2 tested Phase A (dashboard assertions) and Phase C (onboarding gating). Results: 4 assertions now PASS (VAL-DASH-017 drawer enrichment, VAL-DRAFTS-001 onboarding gates drafts, VAL-DRAFTS-005 draft blocking works, VAL-CROSS-008 recovery path works). 5 assertions remain BLOCKED: (1) VAL-DASH-002 needs activity feed items with overdue follow-up dates in sheet data, (2) VAL-DASH-009/010/011/018 require Google authentication which agent-browser sessions don't inherit from setup. The setup features claimed 'signed-in browser state is ready' but agent-browser creates fresh browser profiles that don't have Google auth cookies. RECOMMENDATION: Either (a) use setup-browser-cookies skill to import Google cookies into agent-browser session, or (b) have user perform live sign-in in the agent-browser session. Phase B (empty pipeline VAL-DASH-013) and Phase D (completed onboarding + generation) were not tested due to time constraints and auth blocker.
